headline: Lindsey Graham 🧓🇺🇸 TRUMP BFF 💥💀 DIES 😵 AORTA BOMB 💣
text: Lindsey Graham 🧓🇺🇸🔥, Trump's ride-or-die 🍊💪, straight-up YEETED 💨 by a sudden heart RUPTURE 💥🫀 at 71. Senator from South Carolina 🐔🌴 just back from Kyiv 🤝🇺🇦 powwow with Zelensky 💬, then BOOM 💥 aorta pops like a MAGA balloon 🎈🍊! Trump 🍊👑 calls him 'true patriot' 🦅🇺🇸 and says he sounded 'great but tired' 😴 on the phone hours before – tough cookie 🍪💪 turned soft ally after Capitol drama 🏛️😡. Once called Trump 'xenophobic bigot' 🗣️🚫 but later stuck with him over border walls 🧱🛡️, Soleimani smackdown 💥🛩️, and judge stacking ⚖️🤡. Graham was foreign policy hawk 🦅✈️ who wanted to OBLITERATE Iran 🌋🇮🇷, arm Ukraine like it’s Black Friday 🛒💰, and hated Afghanistan pullout 😭🇦🇫. Netanyahu 🇮🇱 cries 'Israel lost its bestie' 🫂💔. McMaster 🧔🏛️ now picks temp fill-in while GOP holds 53-47 Senate lead 🗳️⚖️. Mitch McConnell 🐢🏥 still in hospital mystery mode 🤒❓ – Washington drama just got 10x spicier 🌶️😩!
